summary: Wrote comprehensive unit and behavioral tests for InstancedBricks (FR-PERF-001, Issue #15). Replaced the minimal 2-test stub with 8 focused unit tests and improved the Playwright e2e performance spec. PR #52 created on branch feature/15-instanced-mesh-rendering-tests. InstancedBricks.tsx implementation is already complete on main — no coding work needed for this FR.

artifacts.name: InstancedBricks unit tests
artifacts.description: 8 unit/behavioral tests for FR-PERF-001 instanced mesh rendering

artifacts.name: Instanced rendering e2e performance spec
artifacts.description: Playwright e2e tests for FPS targets and scale

human_review_required.reason: CI runners may not achieve 60/30 FPS; consider test.slow() or lower CI threshold
Tests rely on R3F internal canvas property; may break on R3F version upgrades

recommended_actions: Verify InstancedBricks.tsx is on the feature branch (implementation is on main)
Run npm test to confirm all 8 unit tests pass
Run npm run test:e2e against dev server to validate performance tests
